allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const lines=fs.readFileSync\('tmp/ai/fine_tune_train_sasha.jsonl','utf8'\).trim\(\).split\('\\n'\); let ok=0,err=0; lines.forEach\(\(l,i\)=>{try{JSON.parse\(l\);ok++;}catch\(e\){err++;console.log\('BAD line',i+1,e.message\);}}\); console.log\(ok,'valid,',err,'errors'\);")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; [print\(d['deploy']['status'].ljust\(12\), d['deploy']['commit']['message'][:55]\) for d in json.load\(sys.stdin\)]")
